680 Phase 9 & 10: Mix With a Plan

9 | Phase 9: Create the Mix Plan | simple Mix Order

e Decide the strategy before touching plugins.

: 1) Organize e Ask: What is the focus? What should be loudest? What needs EQ, compression, 2) Balance space, width, or automation? r3) Shape

e Choose a professional reference and define the target sound. 4) Enhance

Automate —«—— Student Rule afi» — tS Mixing is not guessing. It is applying a plan. 6 Compare

Phase 10: Execute the Mix

e Organize the session, gain stage, balance levels, pan, EQ, compress, shape drums and bass, place the lead, add effects, and automate.

e Compare to references and revise if needed.

e If the mix is not working, stop and improve the plan instead of stacking random processing.

—alfh- Student Rule ——=l| — Fix the plan before adding more plugins.
